VAL-EVENTS-005.notes: Football search filters correctly. Typed 'Jordan' in Find matches search box, only 'Jordan VS Argentina' match displayed. Cleared search field, all 4 matches restored (Jordan VS Argentina, Algeria VS Austria, Brazil VS Germany, Spain VS France). No console errors.

steps.expected: Football tab with search and match cards
steps.observed: Football tab displayed with 4 match cards and 'Find matches' search input
Only 'Jordan VS Argentina' match card displayed

VAL-EVENTS-006.notes: Basketball search filters correctly. Typed 'Lakers' in Find matches search box, only 2 games with Lakers displayed (Suns VS Lakers, Lakers VS Spurs). Cleared search field, all 4 games restored. No console errors.

steps.observed: Basketball tab displayed with 4 match cards and 'Find matches' search input
2 match cards displayed: Suns VS Lakers and Lakers VS Spurs

VAL-EVENTS-007.notes: Concert search filters correctly. Typed 'Taylor' in 'Find a star or performance' search box, only Taylor Swift event displayed. Cleared search field, all 4 concert events restored (Taylor Swift, Ed Sheeran, The Weeknd, Beyoncé). No console errors.

VAL-EVENTS-011.notes: Empty state correctly displayed when searching for non-matching term. Typed 'xyznonexistent' in Football tab search, 'No matches found' message displayed with no stale cards visible. No console errors.

steps.observed: 'No matches found' paragraph displayed, no match cards visible

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. Football, Basketball, and Concert search filters correctly filter event cards by team/artist name, clearing restores full list. Empty state shows 'No matches found' with no stale cards.
